speaker: speaker1
text: We have made some adjustment on the prices . And this is renewed price list .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you for allowing us 3 % reduction , but still we find your price is on the high side .

speaker: speaker1
text: This is our rock-bottom price , and we can't make any further reduction .

speaker: speaker2
text: If so , we find it difficult for us to go on with our talks .

speaker: speaker1
text: We are sincere to make business with you , but the difference between your counter-offer and our price is too great .

speaker: speaker2
text: So are we . Our counter-offer is in line with the world market .

speaker: speaker1
text: How about meeting each other half-way in order to conclude the business ?
